title: arum nigrum var. schottii
intro: Arum nigrum var. schottii, also known as Schott's black calla, is a variety of the black calla lily, a flowering plant native to Sri Lanka. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Arum nigrum var. schottii are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Arum nigrum var. schottii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including colds, coughs, and skin infections.
